zh.Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Engla: 英國林可爾史爾馬雷哈姆 奧 馮 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Dymoke於1428年4月出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比時，他的父親Philip Dymoke22歲，母親Joan Conyers24歲。他於1457年6月13日與Margaret Welles在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年3月12日在英國林可爾史爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Dymoke于1428年4月出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比时，他的父亲Philip Dymoke22岁，母亲Joan Conyers24岁。他于1457年6月13日与Margaret Welles在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年3月12日在英国林可爾史爾享年41岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dimmock
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Dymoke was born in April 1428, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Philip Dymoke, was 22 and his mother, Joan Conyers, was 24. He married Margaret Welles on 13 June 1457, in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 March 1470, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in England.

fr.Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Engla: Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Dymoke est né en avril 1428, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Dymoke, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Conyers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Welles le 13 juin 1457, à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1470, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

Juni 1457 in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England Margaret Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1470 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dymoke è nato il nel aprile 1428 nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Philip Dymoke, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Conyers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Welles il 13 giugno 1457, nel Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1470, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dymokeが1428年4月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで生まれた時，父Philip Dymokeは22歳，母Joan Conyersは24歳であった。1457年6月13日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーでMargaret Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年3月12日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで41歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dymoke(이)가 1428년 4월 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Dymoke(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Conyers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1457년 6월 13일 영국 링코실르 그림스비에서 Margaret Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 3월 12일 영국 링코실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Engla: Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dymoke nasceu em abril de 1428, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Dymoke, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Conyers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Welles em 13 de junho de 1457, em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1470, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Engla: марэам он т хилл, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Dymoke родился апрель 1428 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip Dymoke было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Conyers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Welles 13 июня 1457 г. в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 марта 1470 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Welles el 13 de junio de 1457, en Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1470, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
